name: gmail
tagline: ClawHub (74★): Gmail API integration with managed OAuth. Read, send, and manage emails, threads, labels, and drafts. Use this skill when us
verdict: Solid all-around: an official vendor CLI from the standard registry, with clean security and quality marks. One nagging weakness: it's installed unpinned/global with no version pin, so a future breaking release could quietly change behavior underneath agents.

highlights.summary: Official vendor CLI from the standard npm registry and a vendor-owned homebrew tap, but installed unpinned/global with no version pin.
